namespaceCoverageExemptions.doc: Documentation rewrite routes are artifact-specific and intentionally exempt from caller recommendations.
namespaceCoverageExemptions.git: Git workflow routes depend on repository and issue state, so caller recommendations remain policy-exempt.
namespaceCoverageExemptions.help: Route lookup renders existing playbooks as a thin pass-through; no capability or effort tier applies.
namespaceCoverageExemptions.test: Test harness dispatch is a maintainer QA surface and remains policy-exempt from caller recommendations.
